page.content: The analysis of the first table reveals correlations between various microRNAs and cardiac parameters, where miR-155 shows an LVEDD r Value of −0.488 and a p Value of 0.153, an LVEF r Value of 0.485 with a p Value of 0.155, an IVS r Value of 0.587 and a p Value of 0.075, an LVPW r Value of 0.413 with a p Value of 0.236, and a HW r Value of 0.597 and a p Value of 0.068. For miR-10b, the LVEDD r Value is 0.323 and p Value 0.363, LVEF r Value is −0.415 with p Value of 0.232, an IVS r Value of 0.007 and a p Value of 0.985, an LVPW r Value of 0.014 with a p Value of 0.969, and a HW r Value of −0.166 with a p Value of 0.647. miR-23a presents an LVEDD r Value of 0.122 and p Value of 0.754, LVEF r Value of −0.026 with p Value of 0.947, an IVS r Value of −0.500 and a p Value of 0.171, an LVPW r Value of −0.293 with p Value of 0.444, and a HW r Value of −0.376 with a p Value of 0.319. miR-214 has an LVEDD r Value of 0.294 and p Value of 0.409, LVEF r Value of −0.394 with p Value of 0.260, an IVS r Value of 0.125 and a p Value of 0.731, an LVPW r Value of 0.188 with p Value of 0.603, and a HW r Value of 0.110 with a p Value of 0.762. Finally, MiR-21 shows an LVEDD r Value of −0.590 and a p Value of 0.872, an LVEF r Value of 0.157 with p Value of 0.665, an IVS r Value of −0.116 and a p Value of 0.749, an LVPW r Value of −0.032 with p Value of 0.929, and a HW r Value of −0.169 with p Value of 0.641. In the second table, Ascaphin-8 presents an S. aureus USA300 MIC of 3.1 μM and an HIV-1 EC50 of 1.2 μM, DASamP1 has an S. aureus USA300 MIC of 3.1 μM and an HIV-1 EC50 of 0.63 μM, DASamP2 shows an S. aureus USA300 MIC of 6.2 μM and DASamP5 has an HIV-1 EC50 of 0.83 μM, Lycotoxin I possesses an S. aureus USA300 MIC of 3.1 μM and Ponericin L2 has an HIV-1 EC50 of 1.4 μM, Maculatin 1.3 reports an S. aureus USA300 MIC of 6.2 μM and Brevinin-2 related has an HIV-1 EC50 of 1.65 μM, and Piscidin 1 indicates an S. aureus USA300 MIC of 3.1 μM and an HIV-1 EC50 of 2.1 μM.
